subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! We are Thy servants, within Thy grasp, and we desire naught save that which Thou hast desired [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انا عبادک و فی قبضتک و ما اردنا الا ما اردته
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
